summary: A local scholarly retrieval and evidence-review system, not merely a searchable library.
final_use_case: It matters because RAG quality depends on the whole evidence path, not only the final answer; the system makes sparse and semantic retrieval, evidence support, citation validity, abstention, contradiction, source influence, and refusal-to-answer discipline inspectable before a research claim is trusted. Its current limit is also explicit: corpus ingestion remains the weak plane to repair before using the library as a full defensive-retrieval testbed.

instruments.input: books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes
instruments.operation: decides what belongs in the scholarly corpus, what is stable but unprocessed, what is committed, and what remains excluded or failed
instruments.output: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states
instruments.status: Status: The system is live today against roughly four thousand committed books and has been growing the queryable searchable view by an order of magnitude per.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes and produce admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion.
instruments.verification_check: Run one corpus query or source-admission fixture through Root Registry And Corpus Admission; confirm source identity, retrieval path, support state, and output: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed....

instruments.input: file paths, internal metadata, editions, duplicate candidates, OCR quality, genre signals, and source typology
instruments.operation: moves from file identity toward work/edition/source identity so duplicate files do not masquerade as independent evidence
instruments.output: bibliographic identity record and authority-control warning surface
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires file paths, internal metadata, editions, duplicate candidates, OCR quality, genre signals, and source typology
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds bibliographic identity record and authority-control warning surface; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept file paths, internal metadata, editions, duplicate candidates, OCR quality, genre signals, and source typology and produce bibliographic identity record and.
instruments.verification_check: Run one corpus query or source-admission fixture through Bibliographic Identity And Authority Control; confirm source identity, retrieval path, support state, and output: bibliographic identity record and authority-control....

instruments.input: admitted source, profile-only mode, structural detectors, bibliography/index/further-reading/glossary/acknowledgment miners, and optional argumentative extraction
instruments.operation: turns a book into structured scholarly records before retrieval or synthesis relies on it
instruments.output: source profile, structural extraction database records, and argumentative-extraction candidates
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires admitted source, profile-only mode, structural detectors, bibliography/index/further-reading/glossary/acknowledgment miners, and optional argumentative extraction
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds source profile, structural extraction database records, and argumentative-extraction candidates; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept admitted source, profile-only mode, structural detectors, bibliography/index/further-reading/glossary/acknowledgment miners, and optional argumentative extraction.
instruments.verification_check: Run one corpus query or source-admission fixture through Extraction Pipeline; confirm source identity, retrieval path, support state, and output: source profile, structural extraction database....

instruments.input: committed corpus records, BM25 index, dense index, query intent, filters, and chunk windows
instruments.operation: uses hybrid dense/sparse retrieval with fusion and domain-aware constraints where available
instruments.output: ranked evidence candidates with provenance as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires committed corpus records, BM25 index, dense index, query intent, filters, and chunk windows
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds ranked evidence candidates with provenance as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.verification_check: Run one corpus query or source-admission fixture through Hybrid Retrieval Plane; confirm source identity, retrieval path, support state, and output: ranked evidence candidates with provenance....

instruments.input: research question, subquestions, scope constraints, and retrieval results
instruments.operation: breaks broad questions into evidence-searchable subclaims instead of asking one fluent answer from a black box
instruments.output: evidence packet organized around answerable claim units
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires research question, subquestions, scope constraints, and retrieval results
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds evidence packet organized around answerable claim units; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.verification_check: Run one corpus query or source-admission fixture through Query Decomposition And Evidence Search; confirm source identity, retrieval path, support state, and output: evidence packet organized around answerable claim units.

instruments.input: candidate answer, retrieved passages, citations, and source lineage
instruments.operation: checks whether claims are supported, weakly supported, contradicted, or unsupported before synthesis is allowed to stand
instruments.output: claim-to-evidence decision packet as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires candidate answer, retrieved passages, citations, and source lineage
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds claim-to-evidence decision packet as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.input: supported claims, rival passages, source families, and uncertainty markers
instruments.operation: looks for source conflict, rival interpretations, and overconfident synthesis before release
instruments.output: contradiction review and narrowed claim ceiling
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires supported claims, rival passages, source families, and uncertainty markers
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds contradiction review and narrowed claim ceiling; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.input: evidence packet, source support state, contradiction state, and user query
instruments.operation: refuses or narrows answers when the corpus cannot support the requested claim; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
instruments.output: answer, qualified answer, follow-up search plan, or refusal
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires evidence packet, source support state, contradiction state, and user query
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds answer, qualified answer, follow-up search plan, or refusal; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.input: redacted evidence package, share request, inventory state, operator intent, and retention rules
instruments.operation: validates that an external package can be issued or shared without raw-text leakage, local-path exposure, or unsupported derived claims
instruments.output: share-authorized export package or blocked share decision
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires redacted evidence package, share request, inventory state, operator intent, and retention rules
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds share-authorized export package or blocked share decision; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.input: evidence states, local-state policies, share-grant requirements, negative-transfer exclusions, and retention rules
instruments.operation: keeps local evidence state and external sharing governed rather than treating retrieval output as freely portable
instruments.output: state/share/retention proof record and review-ready audit surface
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires evidence states, local-state policies, share-grant requirements, negative-transfer exclusions, and retention rules
